videos.title: 9 POWERFUL Things That Happen To Your Body When You Drink Beet Juice

transcript.fullText: all right [Music] what happens to your body when you drink beet juice every day beet juice is one of the most popular juices around today and it lives up to its name the taste as you can imagine is very similar to beets this makes it a bit hard for those who aren't big fans of this unique taste to drink beet juice regularly however its health benefits outweigh its taste beets are root vegetables that come in red yellow and white varieties they are rich in vitamins A and C as well as potassium iron and magnesium they are also a good source of fiber in this video we are going to be talking about the amazing health benefits of drinking beet juice every day before we proceed please note that everything mentioned in this video is unbiased fact checked and reviewed by qualified health professionals with that said let's jump in and talk about the nine benefits of beet juice number one detoxifies the liver the liver is one of the most important organs in our body it performs around 500 different functions including producing bile and blood removing toxins and providing support to the immune system because of this it's important to keep your liver healthy but a healthy liver isn't just about keeping your blood clean and your digestive system functioning your liver also plays an important role in maintaining your energy levels and mental Clarity if you're feeling sluggish or mentally foggy it could be due to a sluggish liver the good news is that there are simple ways to support this essential organ like drinking beet juice for example beets contain betaine which is an amino acid that supports liver function betaine helps detoxify the body by clearing out harmful toxins like ammonia from protein breakdown beets are also rich in nitrates which helps your body produce more oxygen-rich blood cells this makes them especially beneficial for those with heart disease and high blood pressure who tend to experience low oxygen levels in their bloodstream number two helps nerves and muscles function properly beet juice has long been used as a natural remedy for helping the body heal itself it was used in ancient Egypt and Greece to treat various conditions today beets are still popularly used to treat heart disease cancer arthritis and even psoriasis beet juice is a great source of potassium which is a mineral that helps your muscles contract potassium is an electrolyte which means it dissolves in water electrolytes are important for the body to function properly because they help transmit electrical signals between nerve cells and muscle cells electrolytes also help regulate blood pressure by allowing your body to retain water or release it into the bloodstream as needed beets contain about 400 milligrams of potassium per cup which makes them one of the best sources of this mineral in all vegetables the betaine found in beets can also help with nerve cell function and muscle contractions by increasing the amount of choline in the body choline is an essential nutrient that helps nerves send messages from one location to another within the body without enough choline nerve cells cannot function properly and muscles may not be able to contract properly either number three boosts stamina your stamina is the ability of your body to continue working without getting tired it's a measure of your physical fitness and it can be improved by exercising regularly if you're looking for an easy way to improve your stamina then beet juice is the answer beetroot juice contains nitrates that help increase blood flow throughout your body including your muscles and brain this allows for greater oxygen delivery to your organs and muscles so you can perform better during workouts but tannin and beets is also absorbed slowly into the bloodstream which means it can supply energy for longer periods liking our video so far before we move on to the next benefit don't forget to hit the like button and subscribe to our channel so you never miss out on our new informative videos number four lowers blood pressure high blood pressure is one of the most important risk factors for heart attack and stroke the good news is that many foods can help lower blood pressure naturally if you have high blood pressure you may want to give beet juice a try a new study found that drinking beet juice can significantly lower your blood pressure beets are packed with nutrients like folate potassium and magnesium these minerals help to relax blood vessels and reduce inflammation which are both common cause of high blood pressure beet juice also increases nitric oxide levels in your body which relaxes your blood vessels and lowers your blood pressure a study found that after two weeks of drinking beet juice the participants had a significant reduction in their systolic blood pressure systolic blood pressure is the top number that represents the force of blood against artery walls when the heart beats number five promotes healthy skin the benefits of beet juice for the skin are many beet juice is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce redness and improve skin tone antioxidants are a group of nutrients that protect your skin from the damaging effects of ultraviolet light and other environmental factors these nutrients include vitamins a c and e and carotenoids such as lycopene and beta-carotene antioxidants also work to slow down or prevent cell damage that occurs with age or sun exposure as you age your body produces fewer antioxidants and it becomes harder for it to repair damaged DNA strands this increases your risk of developing cancerous cells in the future beet juice also contains betalane which helps fight free radicals that cause wrinkles and dark spots in the skin beta lanes are pigments that give color to a variety of fruits and vegetables the most common beta lanes are beta cyanines which give beets their deep red color number six May prevent dementia drinking beet juice has been shown to improve brain health and boost cognition beetroot juice is rich in nitrates which are converted into nitric oxide in the body nitric oxide helps relax blood vessels which improves blood flow and oxygen levels to the brain this boosts brain health and cognitive performance a new study shows that nitric oxide protects against Alzheimer's disease the findings suggests that boosting levels of nitric oxide could be a promising new way to prevent or even treat Alzheimer's scientists have known for some time that nitric oxide is important for brain function for example it can help how well neurons communicate with each other but its exact role hasn't been clear number seven lowers cholesterol levels the juice of beets is a natural remedy for lowering cholesterol cholesterol is a waxy fat like substance that occurs naturally in every cell of the body it helps digest fat and absorb vitamins but when you have too much of it in your blood it can lead to heart disease and stroke a high level of cholesterol is a major risk factor for heart disease as well as other serious conditions like diabetes and cancer beets are rich in folate which helps reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease folate is important for cardiovascular health because it helps to prevent levels of homocysteine from becoming too high homocysteine is an amino acid that can damage blood vessels and contribute to the hardening of the arteries researchers found that drinking beet juice can lower bad cholesterol levels by as much as 13 percent within one hour after consumption the researchers also noted that beet juice consumption did not affect good cholesterol or triglyceride levels number eight promotes Eye Health beet juice has been shown to promote Eye Health by preventing macular degeneration which is a major cause of blindness macular degeneration is a disease that causes damage to the retina the retina contains millions of light sensing cells called rods and cones the rods help you see in dim light and the cones help you see fine detail macular degeneration damages these light sensing cells over time and leads to vision loss and blindness in some people several Studies have shown that drinking beet juice may help prevent or slow down the progression of age-related macular degeneration in one study published in the British Journal of nutrition researchers found that drinking beet juice daily for 12 weeks improved blood flow to the retina it also reduced markers of oxidative stress in people with early age-related macular degeneration number nine May prevent cancer to put it simply beet juice is a miracle food the root vegetable is packed with antioxidants and other nutrients that can help protect your body from disease beta Lanes found in beets are powerful antioxidants that help prevent cancer and other diseases by activating detoxification enzymes in the body beet juice helps your liver eliminate toxins including carcinogens that promote cancer in addition to helping prevent cancer beet juice may also help treat existing cancers it's one of the top Foods on the list of natural remedies for cancer prevention and treatment the antioxidants in beets can fight free radicals which are unstable molecules that damage DNA and cause cell death free radical damage can lead to cancer development if left unchecked studies show that drinking beet juice can reduce DNA damage by up to 40 percent betalanes also have anti-inflammatory Effects by inhibiting the production of inflammatory cytokines which are proteins that stimulate immune cells to produce inflammation throughout the body reducing inflammation is important because chronic low-grade inflammation can lead to cancer development in animal studies beta Lanes have been shown to inhibit tumor growth beets may not be everyone's cup of tea but the nutritional benefits of this healthy food are worth considering for those who do enjoy beets knowing these benefits can help you make informed choices about how you prepare them and enjoy them in your meals so it's now easy to see that there are many potential benefits of beet juice they're not for everyone but for anyone looking for a way to increase overall health and stamina beets may be your answer enjoyed this video hit the like button and subscribe to our channel for more informative videos like this one thanks for watching your Wellness is our mission thank you

videos.title: Over 50? NEVER Drink Beet Juice With THESE 7 Foods - It Can Cause Serious Health Problems!

transcript.fullText: Did you know that one of the healthiest fruit juices on the planet can become dangerous with just one wrong ingredient? Many people start their morning feeling proud. They juice a fresh beetroot, pour it into a glass, and believe they are fueling their heart, cleansing the liver, and boosting energy for the entire day. What most people do not realize is that beetroot is extremely powerful. And like anything powerful, it requires respect. Inside this humble red root are compounds that can transform circulation, open blood vessels, support liver function, and increase stamina. However, these same compounds react strongly when combined with the wrong foods. In this video, we will uncover seven beet juice combinations you should never make, including one that can be truly dangerous for anyone over 50 or for those living with kidney or digestive issues. More importantly, I will show you five precise principles that allow your heart, liver, circulation, and energy to benefit safely and effectively. Before we begin, please press the like button, leave a comment to let me know where you are watching from, and subscribe so you never miss important health information designed specifically for men over 50. Now, let me share what you need to know. What you learn today may permanently change how you prepare this healing juice. Every day, thousands of people unknowingly create beet juice combinations that irritate the stomach, trigger fermentation, increase oxalate levels, overload the liver, impair circulation, and even neutralize the very nutrients they are trying to absorb. The most alarming part is that these harmful blends appear healthy on the surface. So, what is really happening inside the body? Mistake number one is combining beet juice with carrots. Beetroot and carrots appear to be a perfect pair. Two brightly colored, nutrient-dense roots that are commonly combined in juices, smoothies, and detox blends. Individually, each vegetable is highly beneficial. But when juiced together in concentrated raw form, they create a silent overload that the kidneys, liver, and blood sugar regulation systems struggle to manage. Both beetroot and carrots are high oxalate vegetables. When consumed separately in moderate portions, oxalates are manageable for most people. But when combined into a powerful juice, oxalate concentration rises sharply. This significantly increases the risk of calcium oxalate kidney stones, especially in older adults, people with diabetes, those who are dehydrated, and anyone with even mild kidney impairment. Oxilates from both roots bind tightly with calcium, forming sharp crystals that accumulate silently until they cause pain, inflammation, or urinary complications. The second issue is blood sugar impact. Both beetroot and carrots contain natural sugars. When juiced, the fiber that slows absorption is removed, allowing sugar to enter the bloodstream rapidly. Without fiber to buffer sugar and oxalates, the juice fermentss quickly in the gut, leading to bloating, gas, and stomach heaviness. Older adults with slower digestion or low stomach acid are particularly vulnerable to these effects. Again, the problem is not the vegetables themselves, but the concentrated combination. Each root is beneficial when eaten whole, cooked, or consumed separately on alternating days. If you are drinking beet juice today, skip the carrots. And if you want carrot juice, enjoy it on its own or combine it with low oxalate, low sugar additions such as cucumber, celery, or a small slice of green apple. In this way, you support kidney function, protect blood sugar balance, and still benefit from the nutritional power of both roots, just not in the same glass. Now, let us move on to how to drink beet juice the right way. Mistake number two is mixing beet juice with honey or sugar. This is one of the most common mistakes people make and unfortunately it is also one of the most harmful. Many people dislike the earthy taste of beetroot. So they try to fix it by adding honey, table sugar or even sweet syrup. It feels harmless. After all, honey is natural, right? But the moment you add concentrated sugar to beet juice, you completely change how the body processes it. Beetroot is naturally rich in nitrates that convert into nitric oxide, a compound that relaxes blood vessels, supports circulation, improves endurance, and helps regulate blood pressure. When beet juice is combined with honey or sugar, this nitrate conversion process is disrupted. As a result, the very benefit most people drink beet juice for, improved blood flow, becomes significantly weaker. What remains is a sugary drink that spikes blood sugar and delivers only a fraction of the cardiovascular support that beetroot can provide on its own. If you truly need to soften the flavor, choose low impact companions such as green apple or cucumber. These add freshness, fiber, and hydration without interfering with nitrates or stressing blood sugar levels. In short, sugar and beet juice do not belong together. If you want beet juice to function as a natural remedy, keep it clean and simple. Your heart, liver, and energy levels will feel the difference. Mistake number three is mixing beet juice with orange. On the surface, this combination sounds healthy. Two vitamin rich fruits blended into a refreshing drink. But for many people, especially older adults or anyone with digestive sensitivity, combining beet juice with orange can quickly backfire. The problem begins with acidity. Oranges are highly acidic and when that acid meets the natural sugars and compounds in beetroot, the result is intestinal fermentation. This leads to excess gas production, bloating, cramping, and uncomfortable abdominal pressure. For individuals with gastritis, acid reflux, or irritable bowel syndrome, this reaction can occur almost immediately. The natural sugars in both beetroot and orange are rapidly absorbed when juiced and no longer buffered by their original fiber structure. They enter the bloodstream quickly. This can cause sharper blood sugar spikes than expected, especially in older adults, people with pre-diabetes, or those with unstable blood pressure. Beet juice works best when the stomach is relatively empty, while orange juice is better tolerated earlier in the day and alongside food to reduce its acidity. So, while the bright color and flavor may appear appealing, beetroot combined with orange causes more harm than benefit when digestive comfort, consistency, and cardiovascular health matter most. If this information is new to you, press the like button and we will move on to the next mistake. Mistake number four is mixing beet juice with vinegar. This may seem like a harmless blend. Vinegar appears in detox drinks, homemade tonics, and countless health tips. But when it comes to beet juice, combining it with vinegar is one of the biggest mistakes you can make. Beetroot is naturally rich in nitrates, compounds that convert into nitric oxide and help open blood vessels, improve circulation, and support healthy blood pressure. Vinegar, however, is extremely acidic, and that acidity can destroy a significant portion of these nitrates before your body has a chance to use them. In other words, you lose the primary benefit that makes beet juice valuable in the first place. The issue goes deeper than nutrient loss. The high acetic acid content in vinegar can irritate the stomach lining when combined with raw beet juice, especially in people who already have acid reflux, gastritis, or sensitive digestion. The best approach is simple. Keep beet juice pure. If you want a lighter, more refreshing texture, use water, cucumber, or low acid fruits such as green apple. Vinegar has its own benefits, just not when mixed with beetroot. Use it in salad dressings or cooking, but keep it away from your morning beet juice if you want to protect your stomach, blood pressure, and the healing compounds that make beetroot such a powerful food. Mistake number five is mixing beet juice with milk or dairy products. Some people try to blend beet juice with milk to make it richer, but this is one of the worst combinations you can create. On the surface, it appears harmless. Beetroot provides nutrients and milk provides protein. However, inside the body, this mixture triggers reactions that lead to digestive disturbance, nutrient loss, and inflammation. The problem begins with acid protein interaction. Beetroot has natural acidity and when beet juice comes into contact with milk proteins, especially casein, it causes them to coagulate prematurely. This coagulation does not occur gently like yogurt fermentation. It happens abruptly inside the stomach. The result is heavy digestion, fermentation, and uncomfortable symptoms such as bloating, gas, reflux, and prolonged stomach discomfort that can last for hours. But the issue goes beyond digestion. Milk requires a very specific digestive environment while beetroot stimulates stomach acid and boflow. When these two processes collide, the body struggles to break down both foods properly. This means you absorb less calcium from the milk and fewer vitamins from the beetroot, which is the opposite of what most people intend when making what they believe is a healthy smoothie. For individuals with lactose intolerance or slower digestion, which becomes more common after the age of 50, this combination often leads to nausea, cramping, or rapid onset acid reflux. This pairing can also overload the liver. Beet juice increases nitric oxide activity and circulation, while milk slows digestion and thickens stomach contents. When consumed together, the liver must work harder to process metabolic byproducts from both foods simultaneously, increasing inflammation rather than reducing it. For those with fatty liver, sluggish digestion, or a history of reflux, this combination should be avoided entirely. If you want a richer beet-based drink, there are safer alternatives. Keep these foods separate, and your stomach, liver, and energy levels will benefit. Mistake number six is mixing beet juice with spinach. Individually, beetroot and spinach are nutrient-dense foods, but when combined in the same juice, especially in concentrated raw form, they create a biochemical burden that the kidneys and bones do not tolerate well. Both beetroot and spinach are extremely high in oxalates, natural plant compounds that bind to minerals such as calcium, magnesium, and iron. When consumed in large amounts or combined together, oxalates can overwhelm the body's ability to process and eliminate them. The greatest risk is kidney stones. Oxalates from both foods bind with calcium in the kidneys and form calcium oxalate crystals, the most common and painful type of kidney stone. This risk is especially high in people with a history of stones, reduced kidney function, mild dehydration, or low magnesium levels. This combination can quickly push the body into a high oxalate load. You may not feel it immediately, but crystals silently accumulate, increasing risk week after week. Over time, this can weaken bones, worsen anemia, or contribute to fatigue and muscle weakness. Individuals with gut conditions such as IBS, gastritis, or low stomach acid are particularly vulnerable. High oxilate juices pass through the digestive tract too quickly, irritating the intestines and causing symptoms such as bloating, cramping, loose stools, or sudden urgency. Older adults with reduced clearance of crystal forming compounds face an even higher risk of oxalate accumulation. This does not mean spinach is harmful or that beetroot should be avoided. It simply means they should not be juiced together, especially in large quantities. If you enjoy greens with beet juice, choose lower oxalate options such as kale, mint, celery leaves, or romaine. If you enjoy spinach, cook it or consume it separately at another time of day, not raw and combined with beetroot. Your kidneys work continuously to protect you. And this is a combination they should not be forced to handle. Mistake number seven is mixing beet juice with lemon. One of the most common habits people have is adding a large squeeze of lemon to their beet juice. It sounds healthy. Vitamin C, freshness, detoxification. So, what could go wrong? Quite a lot. Lemon is extremely acidic. And when that strong acidity interacts with the natural compounds in raw beetroot, the pH of the juice shifts immediately. For many older adults, especially those with gastritis, acid reflux, or sensitive stomachs, this can cause irritation within minutes. People often report heartburn, nausea, or stomach sourness shortly after drinking this combination without realizing that lemon is the trigger. But the larger issue is what happens to beetroot nutrients. Beetroot is naturally rich in plant-based iron and beneficial pigments that support blood formation and circulation. These nutrients require a stable internal environment to be absorbed properly. When lemon excessively acidifies the mixture, it disrupts that process. Instead of enhancing absorption, the acidity interferes with it, particularly iron absorption, effectively cancelling one of the main benefits people seek from beet juice. And if you are dealing with acid reflux, this combination can further irritate the esophagus. Lemon itself is not the villain. The problem lies in the quantity. A small hint of flavor may be harmless, but a large squeeze, half a lemon, or the juice of a whole lemon is where the trouble begins. Stay with me because the next benefits are essential. First, respect the dosage. The key number is 100 to 120 milliliters. The biggest mistake men make is believing that more is better. One medium-sized beet is the maximum daily limit. From a medical standpoint, the body can only process a limited amount of nitrate at one time. Drinking more does not increase vasoddilation. Instead, it raises oxalate levels, places strain on the kidneys, and can lead to buria, a sign that the body is overloaded and unable to process excess pigments. 100 to 120 ml of pure juice is the ideal range to support energy without overwhelming your filtration systems. Second, keep the juice clean and original. Do not add sugar, honey, or any sweeteners. As explained earlier, sugar is an enemy of nitric oxide. If the earthy taste feels too strong, dilute with cucumber or celery. These vegetables are rich in electrolytes and contain enzymes that support liver detoxification without raising blood sugar levels. Allow your taste to adapt to the natural flavor. This is a form of respect for your body. Third, the golden timing is 30 minutes before breakfast. Why? On an empty stomach. When the stomach is light, the conversion of nitrate from the mouth to the stomach is most effective. Beneficial oral bacteria need time to interact with the juice before it reaches the digestive tract. Do not rinse your mouth or brush your teeth immediately afterward. Allow the compounds to absorb naturally. A glass of beet juice early in the morning prepares your blood vessels for optimal dilation, helping you maintain alertness and endurance throughout the day. Fourth, drink slowly and treat it like a fine wine. Beet juice is not meant to be taken as a quick shot. Sip it slowly in small amounts. This allows enzymes in the saliva to begin nitrate conversion directly in the oral cavity. For older adults, slow consumption helps the blood pressure system adjust gradually to vasoddilation. Reducing the risk of dizziness from sudden drops in pressure. Fifth, follow the rotation rule to give the kidneys rest. Do not drink beet juice every day of the year. The body needs breaks to process accumulated oxalates. The best approach is five consecutive days followed by two days off or rotating with celery juice or cucumber water. This variety protects bone minerals and significantly reduces the risk of kidney stone formation. As you can see, health does not come from expensive miracles. It comes from understanding and discipline in the smallest habits. Preparing a glass of juice correctly is a way of showing respect for the remarkable biological system within you. The final question I want to leave you with tonight is this. Will you continue drinking based on habit and face silent risks? Or will you begin applying medical logic to truly take control of your health starting tomorrow? Remember, at the age of 60, the body no longer tolerates repeated mistakes. A small change in your juice preparation may be the beginning of a new and more vital chapter of your life. If this video helped you recognize a mistake you may have made, press like to share this message with the men around you. Share it with a friend who drinks juice daily. You may be helping them avoid a serious kidney issue. Thank you for listening. Stay mentally sharp and choose vitality every day. Goodbye and I will see you again

adults with reduced clearance of crystal
forming compounds face an even higher
risk of oxalate accumulation. This does
not mean spinach is harmful or that
beetroot should be avoided. It simply
means they should not be juiced
together, especially in large
quantities. If you enjoy greens with
beet juice, choose lower oxalate options
such as kale, mint, celery leaves, or
romaine. If you enjoy spinach, cook it
or consume it separately at another time
of day, not raw and combined with
beetroot. Your kidneys work continuously
to protect you. And this is a
combination they should not be forced to
handle. Mistake number seven is mixing
beet juice with lemon. One of the most
common habits people have is adding a
large squeeze of lemon to their beet
juice. It sounds healthy. Vitamin C,
freshness, detoxification.
So, what could go wrong? Quite a lot.
Lemon is extremely acidic. And when that
strong acidity interacts with the
natural compounds in raw beetroot, the
pH of the juice shifts immediately. For
many older adults, especially those with
gastritis, acid reflux, or sensitive
stomachs, this can cause irritation
within minutes. People often report
heartburn, nausea, or stomach sourness
shortly after drinking this combination
without realizing that lemon is the
trigger. But the larger issue is what
happens to beetroot nutrients. Beetroot
is naturally rich in plant-based iron
and beneficial pigments that support
blood formation and circulation. These
nutrients require a stable internal
environment to be absorbed properly.
When lemon excessively acidifies the
mixture, it disrupts that process.
Instead of enhancing absorption, the
acidity interferes with it, particularly
iron absorption, effectively cancelling
one of the main benefits people seek
from beet juice. And if you are dealing
with acid reflux, this combination can
further irritate the esophagus. Lemon
itself is not the villain. The problem
lies in the quantity. A small hint of
flavor may be harmless, but a large
squeeze, half a lemon, or the juice of a
whole lemon is where the trouble begins.
Stay with me because the next benefits
are essential. First, respect the
dosage. The key number is 100 to 120
milliliters. The biggest mistake men
make is believing that more is better.
One medium-sized beet is the maximum
daily limit. From a medical standpoint,
the body can only process a limited
amount of nitrate at one time. Drinking
more does not increase vasoddilation.
Instead, it raises oxalate levels,
places strain on the kidneys, and can
lead to buria, a sign that the body is
overloaded and unable to process excess
pigments. 100 to 120 ml of pure juice is
the ideal range to support energy
without overwhelming your filtration
systems. Second, keep the juice clean
and original. Do not add sugar, honey,
or any sweeteners. As explained earlier,
sugar is an enemy of nitric oxide. If
the earthy taste feels too strong,
dilute with cucumber or celery. These
vegetables are rich in electrolytes and
contain enzymes that support liver
detoxification without raising blood
sugar levels. Allow your taste to adapt
to the natural flavor. This is a form of
respect for your body. Third, the golden
timing is 30 minutes before breakfast.
Why? On an empty stomach. When the
stomach is light, the conversion of
nitrate from the mouth to the stomach is
most effective. Beneficial oral bacteria
need time to interact with the juice
before it reaches the digestive tract.
Do not rinse your mouth or brush your
teeth immediately afterward. Allow the
compounds to absorb naturally. A glass
of beet juice early in the morning
prepares your blood vessels for optimal
dilation, helping you maintain alertness
and endurance throughout the day.
Fourth, drink slowly and treat it like a
fine wine. Beet juice is not meant to be
taken as a quick shot. Sip it slowly in
small amounts. This allows enzymes in
the saliva to begin nitrate conversion
directly in the oral cavity. For older
adults, slow consumption helps the blood
pressure system adjust gradually to
vasoddilation. Reducing the risk of
dizziness from sudden drops in pressure.
Fifth, follow the rotation rule to give
the kidneys rest. Do not drink beet
juice every day of the year. The body
needs breaks to process accumulated
oxalates. The best approach is five
consecutive days followed by two days
off or rotating with celery juice or
cucumber water. This variety protects
bone minerals and significantly reduces
the risk of kidney stone formation. As
you can see, health does not come from
expensive miracles. It comes from
understanding and discipline in the
smallest habits. Preparing a glass of
juice correctly is a way of showing
respect for the remarkable biological
system within you. The final question I
want to leave you with tonight is this.
Will you continue drinking based on
habit and face silent risks? Or will you
begin applying medical logic to truly
take control of your health starting
tomorrow? Remember, at the age of 60,
the body no longer tolerates repeated
mistakes. A small change in your juice
preparation may be the beginning of a
new and more vital chapter of your life.
If this video helped you recognize a
mistake you may have made, press like to
share this message with the men around
you. Share it with a friend who drinks
juice daily. You may be helping them
avoid a serious kidney issue. Thank you
for listening. Stay mentally sharp and
choose vitality every day. Goodbye and I
will see you again

videos.title: 9 POWERFUL Things That Happen To Your Body When You Drink Beet Juice

transcript.fullText:
Hey there, viewers! Let’s talk about 
beetroots. Their pinkish-red color will make anyone fall in love with them. They go well in 
salads and soups. But cooking them can destroy their nutrients. Juicing remains the easiest 
and healthiest way to eat fresh beetroot. Get ready to have a major beetroot meltdown, as 
we discuss the 9 benefits of beet juice in today's video. Does it boost your stamina? Can it help you 
lose weight? Let's discuss all this and more... 1. Reduces Blood Pressure There’s a reason beetroots are considered a 
superfood. It can lower your blood pressure, and reduce your chances of heart disease. Hypertension is a serious condition across 
the globe. It claims so many lives every year. People pop medications, when all they really 
need to do is have a glass of beetroot juice. Drinking just 250 ml of juice on the regular can 
have a significant effect on your blood pressure. Beetroots have a high level of nitrates. After 
having beet juice, the nitrates mix with your blood. In the process, they form a new compound 
called nitric oxide. This powerful chemical can widen and relax all those tight blood vessels. As 
soon as this happens, blood gushes to important organs like your brain, heart and muscles. 
This balances out your blood pressure. What’s your favorite type of homemade 
juice? Sound off in the comment section, and start a conversation 
with our Bestie community... 2. Increases Stamina Do you ever finish a workout and think, “If 
only I lifted a little harder”? Beetroot juice can make this a reality. This is why most 
athletes have a fresh glass before a game. This vegetable gives strength to your muscles, 
helping you deal with that extra stress. This is again thanks to the nitrates. Let 
me break it down more. Oxygen is required for your body to perform its tasks. More 
oxygen is better for their functioning. Constricted blood vessels carry less oxygen 
to the muscles. Nitrates will increase their oxygen-carrying capacity. With the fuel from 
oxygen, your muscles kick into full swing. A study found out that trained cyclists who had just 2 cups of beet juice could 
improve their trail by 12 seconds. It's about time you said goodbye to orange, 
apple, or any other popular breakfast juice. Beet juice is great for waking 
those sleepy organs up. It serves as a great pre-workout to prepare 
your body for physical exhaustion. It also helps with weight loss, as it has 
almost zero calories. It’s second only to water. Looking for answers on all the latest health 
and wellness news? Hit that “subscribe” button, and join our millions of followers. Stay 
up to date on all our great Bestie content… 3. Glowing Skin Not all people are blessed with flawless skin. If you constantly hide behind filters on 
Instagram, this one's for you. No amount of makeup or skin cream can change your skin’s 
texture & quality. You need a boost from within. Beetroot juice is a great blood purifier and will improve circulation. With more supply of blood 
to the skin, it will be firm and radiant. There will be visible differences, as those dark 
spots, blemishes and dead cells start fading away. Vitamin C in beet juice can give your skin a blast 
of antioxidants and keep you looking younger. Say goodbye to make-up as your cheeks 
are going to be blushing naturally. 4. Heart Health Beetroot juice is heart-friendly. You 
probably think it would take months to see the positive effects 
of beet juice on your health. But it happens a lot quicker than that. 
Your heart requires the help of surrounding muscles to pump blood. If the muscles 
become fatigued, your heart could fail. A study shows that people with heart failure 
experienced a 13% rise in muscle power. This happened within just two hours of drinking a glass 
of beet juice. Seems like sorcery, but it's true. Before we move ahead, here’s another 
video on heart health you should consider. Watch 8 signs your body gives you 
a month before a heart attack. Now back to our discussion on 9 
Health Benefits of Beet Juice... 5. Beats Dementia Beet juice guarantees a younger and more 
active brain. When you start growing old, your body’s unable to produce the same 
amount of nitrates it did years ago. Beet juice provides that extra boost. A few studies show that the blood flow to the 
frontal lobe increases after consuming beet juice. Different parts of the brain are associated 
with different activities your body performs. Frontal lobes are linked to memory, 
judgment, impulse control, and cognition. With more blood in this area, it 
functions like a well-oiled machine. 6. Fights Cancer A few foods are known to keep cancer at 
bay. Beetroots are one of them. The rich color of beetroot is brought to you by betalains 
(beta-lains). These are soluble antioxidants. This colored chemical can destroy 
unstable cancer cells in your body. Researchers call these chemical compounds 
scavengers, as they drag free radicals out of your body and keep you healthy. Now, 
more research is required in this field, but from what we have so far, we can safely 
say that beets are super effective against breast cancer. They can also prevent 
cancer of the lung, colon, and liver. 7. Doubles as Blood Tonic This veggie juice is the coolest 
way to remove toxins from the body. It improves circulation and stimulates red 
blood cell production. It's the best homemade tonic for people running low on hemoglobin. 
It’s also good for people who are anemic. Make it a point to have a glass each 
day, especially if you’re pregnant. The folate in beetroots will reduce your 
baby's risk of being born prematurely. It can also help prevent certain diseases 
from developing along your spine. Beetroot juice can also be great if you're 
planning a pregnancy in the future. It will keep you in the best shape possible. If you 
don't enjoy its earthy taste, add a few carrots, along with some celery, apples and lemons. These 
will provide you with so many extra nutrients. On top of that, you can add ginger and mint. 
This will help put an end to indigestion. Blend it all together. If you want to make 
it thicker, try not putting in as much water. If you want to make it more 
refreshing, add a couple ice cubes. Aside from folate, your body will get 
a boost of other essential minerals. These work to strengthen your immune system 
and make your bones and teeth rock hard. These minerals include things like iron, magnesium, 
manganese, sodium, zinc, copper, and selenium. Finally, beets just aren’t beets without 
Potassium. This mineral is so amazing, it serves as a natural cure for sore muscles 
and nerves. If you’ve been feeling tired, try having one glass daily to improve 
your strength. You won’t regret it. 8. Detoxifies Your Liver Your liver is probably the most hardworking 
organ in your body. If you don’t have a healthy, functioning liver, it could mean your 
life. When your eating habits are bad, and all you’re stuffing into your body is 
junk food, your liver is left miserable. Make a conscious effort to relieve your 
liver, and start drinking more beet juice. If you’re not convinced, just 
think about this. All those wild party nights drinking and eating are 
exposing your liver to toxic substances. Your liver can get gross and fatty. This 
doesn’t nothing but harm to your health. There is also something called 
non-alcoholic fatty liver disease. This is when the organ becomes fatty 
with little to know alcohol consumption. This is why beet juice is so important. 
An antioxidant called betaine (beta-in) helps to remove excess fat from the liver 
and bring it back to its healthy form. 9. Reduces Cholesterol High cholesterol levels can be dangerous for 
you. But it first depends on which cholesterol we’re talking about. LDL is the bad kind, while 
HDL is the good one. Beetroot helps to increase HDL in many people. This is probably because 
of phytonutrients (fight-o- nutrients) like flavonoids (flay-vuh-noyds) 
that are present in beets. Hearing all of this is probably making 
you want to jump out of your seat and run to the grocery store. Well before you do that, just a word of caution. Beetroot can cause 
your stool to look… Well… A little red. This is pretty scary at first 
sight, but it’s actually harmless. Beetroot juice contains calcium oxalate 
(awk-suh-layt) crystals. These are not very friendly to your kidneys. This is why you 
should know your limits. Just a few crystals can have a sort of cleansing effect on your body. 
However, having too many can cause kidney stones. You can probably live with one kidney, but 
it’s not something you should work towards. Have I sparked your interest? Let’s keep 
this conversation going with a couple more kidney-related videos, shall 
we? Here’s what you need to know. Watch 12 signs your kidneys need help. Or how 
about 13 foods that make your Kidneys healthy? Go ahead, click one. Or better yet, watch both, and learn more about how to keep your 
kidneys in shape. Are you going to start drinking beetroot after watching this 
video? Let us know in the comments below!

segments.text:
Hey there, viewers! Let’s talk about 
beetroots. Their pinkish-red color will make

anyone fall in love with them. They go well in 
salads and soups. But cooking them can destroy

their nutrients. Juicing remains the easiest 
and healthiest way to eat fresh beetroot.

Get ready to have a major beetroot meltdown, as 
we discuss the 9 benefits of beet juice in today's

video. Does it boost your stamina? Can it help you 
lose weight? Let's discuss all this and more...
1. Reduces Blood Pressure

There’s a reason beetroots are considered a 
superfood. It can lower your blood pressure,
and reduce your chances of heart disease.

Hypertension is a serious condition across 
the globe. It claims so many lives every year.

People pop medications, when all they really 
need to do is have a glass of beetroot juice.

Drinking just 250 ml of juice on the regular can 
have a significant effect on your blood pressure.

Beetroots have a high level of nitrates. After 
having beet juice, the nitrates mix with your

blood. In the process, they form a new compound 
called nitric oxide. This powerful chemical can

widen and relax all those tight blood vessels. As 
soon as this happens, blood gushes to important

organs like your brain, heart and muscles. 
This balances out your blood pressure.

What’s your favorite type of homemade 
juice? Sound off in the comment section,

and start a conversation 
with our Bestie community...
2. Increases Stamina

Do you ever finish a workout and think, “If 
only I lifted a little harder”? Beetroot juice

can make this a reality. This is why most 
athletes have a fresh glass before a game.

This vegetable gives strength to your muscles, 
helping you deal with that extra stress.

This is again thanks to the nitrates. Let 
me break it down more. Oxygen is required

for your body to perform its tasks. More 
oxygen is better for their functioning.

Constricted blood vessels carry less oxygen 
to the muscles. Nitrates will increase their

oxygen-carrying capacity. With the fuel from 
oxygen, your muscles kick into full swing.
A study found out that trained cyclists who

had just 2 cups of beet juice could 
improve their trail by 12 seconds.

It's about time you said goodbye to orange, 
apple, or any other popular breakfast juice.

Beet juice is great for waking 
those sleepy organs up. It serves

as a great pre-workout to prepare 
your body for physical exhaustion.

It also helps with weight loss, as it has 
almost zero calories. It’s second only to water.

Looking for answers on all the latest health 
and wellness news? Hit that “subscribe” button,

and join our millions of followers. Stay 
up to date on all our great Bestie content…
3. Glowing Skin
Not all people are blessed with flawless skin.

If you constantly hide behind filters on 
Instagram, this one's for you. No amount

of makeup or skin cream can change your skin’s 
texture & quality. You need a boost from within.
Beetroot juice is a great blood purifier and will

improve circulation. With more supply of blood 
to the skin, it will be firm and radiant.

There will be visible differences, as those dark 
spots, blemishes and dead cells start fading away.

Vitamin C in beet juice can give your skin a blast 
of antioxidants and keep you looking younger.

Say goodbye to make-up as your cheeks 
are going to be blushing naturally.
4. Heart Health

Beetroot juice is heart-friendly. You 
probably think it would take months

to see the positive effects 
of beet juice on your health.

But it happens a lot quicker than that. 
Your heart requires the help of surrounding

muscles to pump blood. If the muscles 
become fatigued, your heart could fail.

A study shows that people with heart failure 
experienced a 13% rise in muscle power. This

happened within just two hours of drinking a glass 
of beet juice. Seems like sorcery, but it's true.

Before we move ahead, here’s another 
video on heart health you should consider.

Watch 8 signs your body gives you 
a month before a heart attack.

Now back to our discussion on 9 
Health Benefits of Beet Juice...
5. Beats Dementia

Beet juice guarantees a younger and more 
active brain. When you start growing old,

your body’s unable to produce the same 
amount of nitrates it did years ago.
Beet juice provides that extra boost.

A few studies show that the blood flow to the 
frontal lobe increases after consuming beet juice.

Different parts of the brain are associated 
with different activities your body performs.

Frontal lobes are linked to memory, 
judgment, impulse control, and cognition.

With more blood in this area, it 
functions like a well-oiled machine.
6. Fights Cancer

A few foods are known to keep cancer at 
bay. Beetroots are one of them. The rich

color of beetroot is brought to you by betalains 
(beta-lains). These are soluble antioxidants.

This colored chemical can destroy 
unstable cancer cells in your body.

Researchers call these chemical compounds 
scavengers, as they drag free radicals out

of your body and keep you healthy. Now, 
more research is required in this field,

but from what we have so far, we can safely 
say that beets are super effective against

breast cancer. They can also prevent 
cancer of the lung, colon, and liver.
7. Doubles as Blood Tonic

This veggie juice is the coolest 
way to remove toxins from the body.

It improves circulation and stimulates red 
blood cell production. It's the best homemade

tonic for people running low on hemoglobin. 
It’s also good for people who are anemic.

Make it a point to have a glass each 
day, especially if you’re pregnant.

The folate in beetroots will reduce your 
baby's risk of being born prematurely.

It can also help prevent certain diseases 
from developing along your spine.

Beetroot juice can also be great if you're 
planning a pregnancy in the future. It will

keep you in the best shape possible. If you 
don't enjoy its earthy taste, add a few carrots,

along with some celery, apples and lemons. These 
will provide you with so many extra nutrients.

On top of that, you can add ginger and mint. 
This will help put an end to indigestion.

Blend it all together. If you want to make 
it thicker, try not putting in as much water.

If you want to make it more 
refreshing, add a couple ice cubes.

Aside from folate, your body will get 
a boost of other essential minerals.

These work to strengthen your immune system 
and make your bones and teeth rock hard. These

minerals include things like iron, magnesium, 
manganese, sodium, zinc, copper, and selenium.

Finally, beets just aren’t beets without 
Potassium. This mineral is so amazing,

it serves as a natural cure for sore muscles 
and nerves. If you’ve been feeling tired,

try having one glass daily to improve 
your strength. You won’t regret it.
8. Detoxifies Your Liver

Your liver is probably the most hardworking 
organ in your body. If you don’t have a healthy,

functioning liver, it could mean your 
life. When your eating habits are bad,

and all you’re stuffing into your body is 
junk food, your liver is left miserable.

Make a conscious effort to relieve your 
liver, and start drinking more beet juice.

If you’re not convinced, just 
think about this. All those

wild party nights drinking and eating are 
exposing your liver to toxic substances.

Your liver can get gross and fatty. This 
doesn’t nothing but harm to your health.

There is also something called 
non-alcoholic fatty liver disease.

This is when the organ becomes fatty 
with little to know alcohol consumption.

This is why beet juice is so important. 
An antioxidant called betaine (beta-in)

helps to remove excess fat from the liver 
and bring it back to its healthy form.
9. Reduces Cholesterol

High cholesterol levels can be dangerous for 
you. But it first depends on which cholesterol

we’re talking about. LDL is the bad kind, while 
HDL is the good one. Beetroot helps to increase

HDL in many people. This is probably because 
of phytonutrients (fight-o- nutrients) like

flavonoids (flay-vuh-noyds) 
that are present in beets.

Hearing all of this is probably making 
you want to jump out of your seat and
run to the grocery store. Well before you do that,

just a word of caution. Beetroot can cause 
your stool to look… Well… A little red.

This is pretty scary at first 
sight, but it’s actually harmless.

Beetroot juice contains calcium oxalate 
(awk-suh-layt) crystals. These are not

very friendly to your kidneys. This is why you 
should know your limits. Just a few crystals

can have a sort of cleansing effect on your body. 
However, having too many can cause kidney stones.

You can probably live with one kidney, but 
it’s not something you should work towards.

Have I sparked your interest? Let’s keep 
this conversation going with a couple

more kidney-related videos, shall 
we? Here’s what you need to know.

Watch 12 signs your kidneys need help. Or how 
about 13 foods that make your Kidneys healthy?
Go ahead, click one. Or better yet, watch both,

and learn more about how to keep your 
kidneys in shape. Are you going to

start drinking beetroot after watching this 
video? Let us know in the comments below!

क्वाइटली ओवरलोड योर सिस्टम इन अ वेरी स्पेसिफिक वे। बीटर रूट ऑलरेडी [संगीत] कैरस अ नेचुरली हाई अमाउंट ऑफ ऑक्सैलिक एसिड। स्पिनच, [संगीत] अम्मा लीव्स एंड सर्टेन डार्क ग्रीन वेजिटेबल्स आल्सो कंटेन अ सिग्निफिकेंट अमाउंट ऑफ ऑक्सिलेट। व्हेन [संगीत] यू ब्लेंड दीज़ टू टुगेदर, यू आर नॉट जस्ट एडिंग न्यूट्रिएंट्स। यू आर एक्चुअली मल्टीप्लाइंग द ऑक्सिलेट ओवरलोड एंटरिंग योर ब्लड स्ट्रीम एट द [संगीत] सेम टाइम। योर बॉडी डस नॉट ट्रीट दीज़ ऑक्सिलेट सेपरेटली। दे कम्बाइन इनटू वन लार्ज बर्डन डैट योर किडनीज़ मस्ट फिल्टर आउट। सो, हेयर इस बायोलॉजिकल इशू दैट मोस्ट पीपल डोंट रियलाइज़। [संगीत] वी ऑलरेडी अंडरस्टुड हाउ ऑक्सक्सिलेट्स बाइंड विद मिनरल्स लाइक कैल्शियम, मैग्नीशियम [संगीत] और इवन आयरन इनसाइड द डाइजेस्टिव ट्रैक। व्हेन बीटर रूट एंड स्पिनच आर [संगीत] कंज्यूम टुगेदर एज़ अ जूस द कंसंट्रेशन बिकम्स हाई इनफ टू रिड्यूस मिनरल अब्सॉर्प्शन इंस्टेड ऑफ़ इंप्रूविंग इट। ओवर टाइम दिस कैन लीड टू सटल डेफिशियंसीस। इवन व्हेन योर [संगीत] डाइट लुक्स परफेक्टली हेल्दी फ्रॉम द आउटसाइड। पीपल समटाइम्स कंप्लेन ऑफ फटीग, मसल टाइटनेस और रेकरिंग किडनी डिसकंफर्ट विदाउट कनेक्टिंग [संगीत] इट टू देयर डेली ग्रीन जूस हैबिट। अनदर इंपॉर्टेंट पॉइंट इज़ दैट जूसिंग रिमूव्स द नेचुरल फाइबर दैट नॉर्मली स्लोस द अब्सॉर्प्शन। विदाउट फाइबर ऑक्सिलेट्स एंटर द सर्कुलेशन मोर रैपिडली। दिस सडन लोड फोर्सेस योर किडनीज़ टू वर्क हार्डर इन अ शॉर्ट टाइम फ्रेम। व्हिच इज व्हाई सम इंडिविजुअल्स एक्सपेरियंस [संगीत] माइल्ड बैक हेवीनेस और इनक्रीस यूरिनेशन आफ्टर रेगुलरली कंज्यूमिंग बीट एंड स्पिनच टुगेदर। द सेफर ऑप्शन इस सरप्राइजिंगली सिंपल। इफ यू एंजॉय बीट जूस कीप इट पेयर्ड विथ लो ऑक्सिलेट वेजिटेबल्स। सच एस क्यूक्बर्स और कैरेट्स इंसड ऑफ़ कंबाइनिंग इट विथ स्पिनिज। मेनी पीपल स्टॉप हियर एंड थिंक दे हैव सॉल्वड द प्रॉब्लम। बट द नेक्स्ट मिस्टेक इज इवन मोर डिसेप्टिव। बिकॉज़ इट इनवॉल्व्स अ फ्रूट डैट इज़ ऑफन मार्क एज़ द परफेक्ट स्मूदी पार्टनर। एंड द रिएक्शन इट क्रिएट्स इनसाइड द ब्लड वेसल्स इज़ समथिंग दैट मोस्ट पीपल नेवर एक्सपेक्ट। द थर्ड कॉम्बिनेशन दैट यू शुड नेवर मिक्स विथ बीटर रूट इज़ बनाना। आफ्टर हियरिंग अबाउट ग्रीस, मेनी पीपल शिफ्ट टुवर्ड्स फ्रूट मैक्स द ड्रिंक क्रीमर, एड्स स्वीटनेस एंड मोस्ट हेल्थ पेजेस प्रमोट इट एज़ एन एनर्जी [संगीत] बूस्टर। बट दिस इज वेयर अनदर सटल इमंबैलेंस कैन बिगिन इनसाइड योर बॉडी एंड इट हैस लेस टू डू विथ डाइजेशन [संगीत] एंड मोर टू डू विथ हाउ योर ब्लड वेसल्स रिस्पोंड। बीटर रूट इज़ नेचुरली रिच इन डाइटरी [संगीत] नाइट्रेट्स। वंस दीज़ नाइट्रेट्स एंटर योर बॉडी दे आर कन्वर्टेड इंटू नाइट्रिक ऑक्साइड अ कंपाउंड दैट रिलैक्सेस ब्लड वेसल्स एंड इंप्रूव सर्कुलेशन। [संगीत] दिस इज़ वन ऑफ़ द रीज़ंस व्हाई बीटर रूट इज प्रेस्ड फॉर हार्ट हेल्थ। बनाना ऑन दी अदर हैंड [संगीत] इज वेरी हाई इन पोटैशियम। अ मिनरल दैट आल्सो सपोर्टस मसल रिलैक्सेशन [संगीत] एंड इन्फ्लुएंसेस ब्लड प्रेशर बाय हेल्पिंग योर बॉडी रिलीज़ एक्सेस सोडियम। इंडिविजुअली [संगीत] बोथ फूड्स आर बेनिफिशियल। द इशू अपीयर्स व्हेन यू कंबाइंड लार्ज अमाउंट ऑफ नाइट्रेट्स [संगीत] फ्रॉम बीटर रूट जूस विथ हाई पोटैशियम फ्रॉम बनानाज़ एट द सेम टाइम। दिस कॉम्बिनेशन कैन एम्पलीफाई वेसोडाइलेशन। [संगीत] मीनिंग योर ब्लड वेसल्स मे रिलैक्स मोर देन योर बॉडी एक्सपेक्ट्स एट दैट मोमेंट। सम पीपल एक्सपीरियंस सडन लाइट हेडेडनेस, फटीग [संगीत] और इवन ड्रॉप इन ब्लड प्रेशर शॉर्टली आफ्टर ड्रिंकिंग दिस ब्लड। स्पेशली इफ दे ऑलरेडी हैव लो ब्लड प्रेशर। और आर टेकिंग मेडिकेशन [संगीत] दैट अफेक्ट्स ब्लड सर्कुलेशन। अनदर थिंग दैट ऑफेन गोज़ अननोटिस्ड [संगीत] इज़ हाउ दिस मिक्सचर अफेक्ट्स योर ब्लड शुगर रिदमम। बनानाज़ डाइजेस्ट वेरी क्विकली। [संगीत] रिलीजिंग नेचुरल शुगर दैट रेज ब्लड ग्लूकोस लेवल्स फास्ट व्हाइल [संगीत] बीटर रूट जूस इनक्रीसेस सर्कुलेशन स्पीड। द फास्टर ब्लड फ्लो कैन समटाइम्स मेक द शुगर राइस एंड फॉइल [संगीत] शार्पर व्हिच लीव्स पीपल फीलिंग टायर्ड और शेकी लेटर इवन दो द ड्रिंक लुक्ड मच हेल्दी। [संगीत] सो इफ यू वांट टू यूज़ बनाना इन योर रूटीन। इट्स बेटर टू कीप इट एस अ सेपरेट स्नैक रादर देन ब्लेंडिंग इट डाइरेक्टली विथ बीट जूस। आल्सो डोंट थिंक दैट डॉक्टर रोहिणी इस स्लोली रिमूविंग आल ऑप्शंस [संगीत] टू कंबाइंड विथ बीट रूट जूस। बाई दी एंड ऑफ़ दिस वीडियो यू विल नो एक्साक्टली व्हाट टू कम्बाइन विथ बीट जूस। द फोर्थ कॉम्बिनेशन दैट यू शुड नेवर मिक्स विथ बीट रूट इज़ सिट्रस फ्रूट्स। समटाइम्स वी फील टेंप्टेड टू स्क्वीज़ अ लिटल बिट ऑफ़ लेमन विथ बीट [संगीत] जूस बिकॉज़ इट इंस्टटेंटली मैक्स द ड्रिंक फील फ्रेशर। मेनी पीपल बिलीव दैट दिस इंप्रूव्स अब्सॉर्प्शन बट व्हाट एक्चुअली हैपेंस [संगीत] इनसाइड योर स्टमक इज क्वाइट डिफरेंट। व्हेन स्ट्रांग सिट्रस एसिड मीट्स [संगीत] बीट जूस द ओवरऑल एसिडिटी मिक्सचर राइजेस शार्पली एंड इट कैन डिस्टर्ब हाउ योर बॉडी हैंडल्स [संगीत] बीटर रूट्स नेचुरल नाइट्रेट्स। बीट जूस आल्सो वर्क्स बेस्ट व्हेन इट्स नाइट्रेट्स कन्वर्ट स्लोली इनटू नाइट्रिक [संगीत] ऑक्साइड हेल्पिंग द ब्लड वेसल्स रिलैक्स इन अ स्टेडी वे। हाइली एसिडिक फ्रूट्स लाइक लेमन एंड ऑरेंज कैन [संगीत] स्पीड अप द गैस्ट्रिक रिएक्शंस एंड इरिटेट द स्टमक लाइनिंग इन सेंसिटिव इंडिविजुअल्स। इंस्टेड ऑफ फीलिंग लाइट सम पीपल माइट नोटिस अ बर्निंग सेंसेशन नोजिया ओर एन अनसेटल्ड स्टमक शॉर्टली आफ्टर ड्रिंकिंग दिस कॉम्बिनेशन। दे आल्सो अ डाइजेस्टिव मिसमैच गोस अननोटिस्ड। सिट्रस टेंड्स टू मूव क्विकली थ्रू द स्टमक व्हाइल बीट जूस [संगीत] इज़ डेंसर एंड अ स्लोअर प्रोसेस। दिस अनइवन पेसिंग कैन लीव द ड्रिंक सिटींग अनकंफर्टेबली लीडिंग टू ब्लोटिंग और माइल्ड क्रमपिंग। इवन दो बोथ इन्ग्रेडिएंट्स सीम हेल्दी ऑन देयर ओन। सो इफ यू एंजॉय लेमन ओर ऑरेंज सच काइंड ऑफ़ सिट्रेस फ्रूट्स द बेटर अप्रोच इज़ टू ड्रिंक [संगीत] बीट रूट्स सेपरेटली एंड हैव लेमन ओर ऑरेंज लेटर एज़ अ पार्ट ऑफ़ द मील। कीपिंग देम अपार्ट अलाओस [संगीत] इच फ़ूड टू वर्क ऑन इट्स ओन रिदमम विदाउट इरिटेटिंग योर डाइजेशन। एंड जस्ट व्हेन यू थिंक एसिडिक फूड्स आर द मेन इशू। द नेक्स्ट कॉम्बिनेशन इज कंप्लीटली डिफरेंट बिकॉज़ इट इनवॉल्व्स हेवी प्रोटीन फूड्स [संगीत] दैट इंटरैक्ट विथ बीट जूस एट अ केमिकल लेवल मोस्ट पीपल नेवर कन्सिडर। [संगीत] फिफ्थ कॉम्बिनेशन दैट यू शुड नेवर मिक्स विद बीट जूस इज़ एग्स, चिकन [संगीत] ओर एनी अदर हेवी प्रोटीन फूड्स। इट साउंड्स स्मार्ट ऑन द सरफेस। बट दिस इज़ वन ऑफ़ दोज़ कॉम्बिनेशन व्हेयर द केमिस्ट्री इनसाइड योर स्टमक चेंजेस इन वेज़ दैट मोस्ट ऑफ़ अस नेवर थिंक अबाउट। बीट रूट कैरिस नेचुरल नाइट्रेट्स व्हाइल [संगीत] फूड्स लाइक एग्स, चिकन और फिश रिलीज़ अमाइंस व्हेन प्रोटीन बिगिंस ब्रेकिंग डाउन ड्यूरिंग योर डाइजेशन। व्हेन लार्ज अमाउंट ऑफ नाइट्रेट मीट्स दीज अमाइंस इन अ हाइली एसिडिक एनवायरमेंट [संगीत] इट कैन एनकरेज द फॉर्मेशन ऑफ नाइट्रोजो कंपाउंड्स योर बॉडी हैज़ अ डिफेंस सिस्टम टू मैनेज स्मॉल अमाउंट्स बट डिफरेंट एक्सपोज़र पुट्स एक्स्ट्रा स्ट्रेस ऑन योर डाइजेस्टिव लाइटनिंग्स। अनदर थिंग पीपल नोटिस इज़ स्लगिश डाइजेशन। हेवी [संगीत] प्रोटीन रिक्वायर्स स्ट्रांग एंड प्रोलोंग स्टमक एक्टिविटी व्हाइल बीट जूस मूव्स फास्ट थ्रू द डाइजेस्टिव शैक। दिस डिफरेंस कैन लीव यू फीलिंग ओवरली फुल ओर ब्लोटेड इवन व्हेन द पोर्शन साइज इज स्मॉल ओर नॉर्मल। अ बेटर अप्प्रोच इज टू ड्रिंक बीट जूस ऑन इट्स ओन ओर अलोंग विथ लाइट प्लांट बेस्ड फ़ूड्स एंड कीप हेवी प्रोटीन मील सेप्रेट बाय कपल ऑफ़ आवर्स। दैट वे यू स्टिल गेट द सर्कुलेशन बेनिफिट्स ऑफ़ बीटर रूट विदाउट क्रिएटिंग अननेसेसरी डाइजेस्टिव स्ट्रीट। द सिक्स्थ कॉम्बिनेशन दैट यू शुड नेवर कंबाइंड विथ बीटर रूट जूस इज़ पैकेज स्वीट जूसेस और रिफाइंड शुगर। हियर इस समथिंग मोस्ट पीपल नेवर क्वेश्चन। बीट जूस आलरेडी टेस्ट स्लाइटली अर्दी। सो मेनी पीपल ट्राई टू मेक इट मोर एंजॉयबल बाई एडिंग शुगर और हनी। इट फील्स हार्मलेस बिकॉज़ द ड्रिंक स्टिल लुक्स नेचुरल। बट दिस इस व्हेयर द रियल मेटाबॉलिक प्रॉब्लम हपेंस। बीटर रूट नेचुरली कंटेन्स [संगीत] बीटली अ डाइटरी नाइट्रेट दैट हेल्प इंप्रूव ब्लड फ्लो एंड इंप्रूव इंसुलिन सेंसिटिविटी। व्हेन यू ऐड रिफाइंड शुगर [संगीत] द ग्लाइससेमिक लोड ऑफ़ द ड्रिंक राइज़ेस शार्पली। एंड इंस्टेड ऑफ़ अ स्लो रिलीज़ ऑफ़ ग्लूकोज़ यू क्रिएट अ रैपिड स्पाइक इन ब्लड शुगर एंड दैट राइज़ कैंसिल्स द स्टेडी मेटाबॉलिक बेनिफिट्स दैट बीट जूस इज़ नोन फॉर। योर बॉडी रिलीज अ स्ट्रांग इंसुलिन रिस्पांस एंड विदिन अ शॉर्ट टाइम मेनी पीपल फील एन एनर्जी क्रैश और अनयुअल फटीग। देयर इज आल्सो अ गट लेवल इफेक्ट दैट कंप्लीटली गोज़ अननोटिस्ड। एक्सेस रिफाइंड शुगर और हनी [संगीत] फीड्स फास्ट गोइंग बैक्टीरियास इन द इंटेस्टाइन रादर देन बेनिफिशियल माइक्रोब्स दैट नॉर्मली थ्राइव ऑन बीटर रूट फाइबर। ओवर टाइम दिस इम्बैलेंस लीड टू ब्लोटिंग, क्रेविंग्स एंड अनस्टेबल एनर्जी पैटर्न, इवन दो [संगीत] द ड्रिंक लुक्स लाइक अ हेल्दी हैबिट। द सिंपलेस्ट फिक्स इज़ टू कीप बीट रूट जूस प्ले। नाउ द लास्ट कॉम्बिनेशन दैट यू शुड नेवर हैव विथ बीटर रूट जूस इज़ फरमेंटेड फ़ूड्स लाइक कर्ड ओर पिकल्स। दिस लास्ट मिस्टेक इज़ युजुअली द वन डैट पीपल [संगीत] डिफेंड द मोस्ट। बिकॉज़ इट फील्स लॉजिकल टू कम्बाइन टू गट फ्रेंडली फ़ूड्स टुगेदर। यू माइट थिंक दैट ड्रिंकिंग बीट जूस अलोंग विथ लिटिल बिट ऑफ कर्ड्स और स्पाइसी पिकल्स विल बूस्ट डाइजेशन। बट इनसाइड योर बॉडी दिस पेयरिंग कैन एक्चुअली ओवरस्टिम्युलेट द फर्मेंटेशन प्रोसेस। बीट जूस कंटेंस नेचुरल शुगर्स एंड प्लांट कंपाउंड्स दैट माइक्रोब्स ब्रेक डाउन क्विकली वंस दे रीच [संगीत] योर गट। फर्मेंटेड फूड्स ऑलरेडी कैरी एक्टिव बैक्टीरियास एंड कंपाउंड्स लाइक हिस्टामिनस एंड ऑर्गेनिक [संगीत] एसिड्स। व्हेन बोथ अराइव टुगेदर, माइक्रोबियल एक्टिविटी कैन स्पीड अप वे टू मच, प्रोडूसिंग एक्सेस एसिड एंड प्रेशर। इंस्टेड ऑफ फीलिंग लाइट, मेनी पीपल नोटिस सडन ब्लोटिंग, वार्मथ इन द स्टमक एंड अ रेस्टलेस सेंसेशन, आफ्टर द ड्रिंक स्पेशली इफ देयर गट इस ऑलरेडी वैरी सेंसिटिव। देर इस आल्सो अ केमिकल एंगल दैट मोस्ट ऑफ़ द पीपल मिस। फर्मेंटेड फूड्स आर स्लाइटली [संगीत] एसिडिक एंड दे कैन आल्सो ऑल्टर हाउ बीट रूट कंपाउंड्स बिहेव ड्यूरिंग डाइजेशन। दिस मे इन इंक्रीस हिस्टामिन लोड इन सम इंडिविजुअल्स व्हिच इज व्हाई हेडेक, स्किन [संगीत] फ्लशिंग और माइल्ड इरिटेशन समटाइम्स अपीयर इवन दो ईच फ़ूड अलोन सीम्स हार्मलेस। द स्मार्टर वे इज़ टू कीप बीट जूस सिंपल एंड ड्रिंक ऑन इट्स ओन। इफ यू एंजॉय कर्ड और पिकल्स हैव देम लेटर विथ अ प्रॉपर मील रादर देन मिक्सिंग देम इन [संगीत] द सेम रूटीन। समटाइम्स द हेल्दीएस्ट फूड्स लूज़ देयर बैलेंस नॉट बिकॉज़ दे आर बैड। बट बिकॉज़ दे आर यूज्ड टुगेदर विथाउट गिविंग योर बॉडी इनफ स्पेस टू प्रोसेस देम कामली। सो बिफोर यू स्टार्ट अवॉइडिंग एवरीथिंग लेट मी मेक दिस वैरी सिंपल बिकॉज़ बीट जूस डस नॉट नीड टू बी वैरी कॉम्प्लिकेटेड। द सेफेस्ट वे टू ड्रिंक [संगीत] इट इज़ विथ फ़ूड देट आर लाइट, न्यूट्रल एंड इजी फॉर यूअर बॉडी टू प्रोसेस। [संगीत] वेजिटेबल्स लाइक कैरेट्स, कूक्कमर, सेल्, बॉटलगार्ड। और इवन अ स्मॉल पीस ऑफ़ जिंजर वर्क वेरी वेल बिकॉज़ दे सपोर्ट हाइड्रेशन एंड डाइजेशन विदाउट इंटरफेरिंग विथ बीट रूट्स, नाइट्रेट्स, ओर मिनरल बैलेंस। यू कैन आल्सो पेअर बीट जूस विथ [संगीत] सो चीया सीड्स, ओर अ स्माल अमाउंट ऑफ़ फ्रेश कोरियंडर लीव्स, इफ यू वांट दैट एक्स्ट्रा फ्रेशनेस विथाउट स्ट्रेसिंग [संगीत] योर गठ। द आइडिया इस टू कीप द ड्रिंक्स सिंपल, सो डेट योर बॉडी अब्सॉर्ब्स [संगीत] नाइट्रिक ऑक्साइड बेनिफिट स्मूथली। इंस्टेड ऑफ़ टर्निंग अ हेल्दी जूस इनटू अ डाइजेस्टिव एक्सपेरिमेंट। [संगीत] सो दिस वाज अबाउट टुडेस वीडियो। लेट मी नो इन द कमेंट सेक्शन इफ यू वुड लाइक मी टू टॉक अबाउट एनी अदर फूड कॉम्बिनेशन। एंड लाइक वी ऑलवेज से इट्स [संगीत] नेवर जस्ट अ डाइट इट्स ऑलवेज अ लाइफस्टाइल। सो स्टे हेल्दी, स्टे फिट, स्टे ग्रेटफुल एंड स्टे ब्लेस्ड। ओम

कैरेट, इट कैन लो योर ब्लड प्रेशर लाइक
मेडिकेशन। इट कैन इनक्रीस योर ब्लड फ्लो
टू द ब्रेन बाय 40% बट दीज़ बेनिफिट्स आर
नॉट द रीज़न टू मेक दिस वीडियो। दिस वीडियो

अ फ्यू मंथ्स एगो विथ वन ऑफ़ माई पेशेंस।
शी वाज़ इनक्रेडिबली हेल्थ कॉन्शियस। द

फ्रस्ट्रेटेड बिकॉज़ शी हैड बीन
एक्सपेरिएंसिंग रेकरिंग किडनी डिसकम्फर्ट
कॉन्सटेंट ब्लोटिंग एंड अनएक्सप्लेंड फटी
फॉर मंथ्स। सो आई डिसाइडेड टू री एअडस्ट
हर डाइट। वी वर्क ऑन हर स्लीप रूटीन
चेंज्ड हर मील टाइमिंग्स बट नथिंग वर्क
एंड द सिम्प्टम्स केप्ट कमिंग बैक।
फाइनली, आई आस्क्ड हर टू टेल मी हर
कंप्लीट डाइट इंक्लुडिंग ड्रिंक्स,
स्नैक्स, और इवन स्मालेस्ट एडिशन्स। एंड
डैट्स व्हेन शी मेंशंड इट वेरी कैजुअली।
समटाइम्स आई ब्लेंड माई बीटर रूट जूस विथ
मिल्क।
एंड सडनली एवरीथिंग क्लिक। द बीटर [संगीत]
रूट जूस डैट शी थॉट वाज़ हिलिंग हर बॉडी,
वॉज़ एक्चुअली क्रिएटिंग द एक्साक्ट
प्रॉब्लम दैट शी वाज़ ट्राइंग टू फिक्स,
[संगीत] जस्ट बिकॉज़ शी कंबाइंड इट विथ

मच सेंस डट वी डोंट इवन क्वेश्चन देम। बट
दे हैव द पोटेंशियल टू [संगीत] डिस्ट्रॉय

ब्लेंड बीटर रूट विद मिल्क और ड्रिंक
मिल्क [संगीत] शॉर्टली आफ्टर बीट जूस

व्हेन कैल्शियम ऑक्सिलेट लेवल्स इनक्रीस

फॉर्मेशन ऑफ़ किडनी स्टोनस इन
इंडिविजुअल्स। हु आर ऑलरेडी प्रोन टू
ऑक्सिलेट सेंसिटिविटी। [संगीत]
इवन इफ स्टोंस डु नॉट फॉर्म दिस
कॉम्बिनेशन रिड्यूसेस द अब्सॉर्प्शन ऑफ़
कैल्शियम [संगीत] एंड आयरन। व्हिच मीन्स
डट यू आर लूजिंग द वेरी न्यूट्रिएंट्स दैट
यू आर ट्राइंग टू गेन। यू मे नोट नोटिस
[संगीत] इम्मीडिएट सिम्टम्स एवरी टाइम विच
इज व्हाई दिस मिस्टेक्स कंटिन्यूस आर
नोटिस। बट विथ रेगुलर इंटेक [संगीत] पीपल
समटाइम्स बिगिन एक्सपीरियंसिंग फुल फ्लेंक
डिसकम्फर्ट ओर इनक्रीस यूरिनरी इरिटेशन
व्हिच दे रेली [संगीत] कनेक्ट बैक टू दिस
फ़ूड कॉम्बिनेशन। द राइट वे टू कंज्यूम बीट
जूस इज टू कीप इट सेपरेट फ्रॉम [संगीत]
डेरी बाय एटलीस्ट टू टू थ्री आवर्स। सेकंड
मिस्टेक पीपल मेक इज़ मेक स्पिनिज एंड अदर
हाईऑक्सिलेट ग्रीनस विथ बीट जूस। मोस्ट
पीपल फील केयरफुल आफ्टर हियरिंग अबाउट
मिल्क एंड दे स्टार्ट थिंकिंग फाइन। आई
विल ओनली मिक्स बीट [संगीत] जूस विथ ग्रीन
वेजिटेबल्स बिकॉज़ फ्रूट्स एंड वेजज़ मेक अ
हेल्दी ऑप्शन। दिस इस एक्साक्ट्ली वेयर द
सेकंड हिडन मिस्टेक हपेंस। व्हाट लुक्स
लाइक अ पावरफुल डिटॉक्स ड्रिंक [संगीत] ऑन
सोशल मीडिया कैन क्वाइटली ओवरलोड योर
सिस्टम इन अ वेरी स्पेसिफिक वे। बीटर रूट
ऑलरेडी [संगीत]
कैरस अ नेचुरली हाई अमाउंट ऑफ ऑक्सैलिक
एसिड। स्पिनच, [संगीत] अम्मा लीव्स एंड
सर्टेन डार्क ग्रीन वेजिटेबल्स आल्सो
कंटेन अ सिग्निफिकेंट अमाउंट ऑफ ऑक्सिलेट।
व्हेन [संगीत] यू ब्लेंड दीज़ टू टुगेदर,
यू आर नॉट जस्ट एडिंग न्यूट्रिएंट्स। यू
आर एक्चुअली मल्टीप्लाइंग द ऑक्सिलेट
ओवरलोड एंटरिंग योर ब्लड स्ट्रीम एट द
[संगीत] सेम टाइम। योर बॉडी डस नॉट ट्रीट
दीज़ ऑक्सिलेट सेपरेटली। दे कम्बाइन इनटू
वन लार्ज बर्डन डैट योर किडनीज़ मस्ट
फिल्टर आउट। सो, हेयर इस बायोलॉजिकल इशू
दैट मोस्ट पीपल डोंट रियलाइज़। [संगीत] वी
ऑलरेडी अंडरस्टुड हाउ ऑक्सक्सिलेट्स बाइंड
विद मिनरल्स लाइक कैल्शियम, मैग्नीशियम
[संगीत] और इवन आयरन इनसाइड द डाइजेस्टिव
ट्रैक। व्हेन बीटर रूट एंड स्पिनच आर
[संगीत] कंज्यूम टुगेदर एज़ अ जूस द
कंसंट्रेशन बिकम्स हाई इनफ टू रिड्यूस
मिनरल अब्सॉर्प्शन इंस्टेड ऑफ़ इंप्रूविंग
इट। ओवर टाइम दिस कैन लीड टू सटल
डेफिशियंसीस। इवन व्हेन योर [संगीत] डाइट
लुक्स परफेक्टली हेल्दी फ्रॉम द आउटसाइड।
पीपल समटाइम्स कंप्लेन ऑफ फटीग, मसल
टाइटनेस और रेकरिंग किडनी डिसकंफर्ट
विदाउट कनेक्टिंग [संगीत] इट टू देयर डेली
ग्रीन जूस हैबिट। अनदर इंपॉर्टेंट पॉइंट
इज़ दैट जूसिंग रिमूव्स द नेचुरल फाइबर दैट
नॉर्मली स्लोस द अब्सॉर्प्शन। विदाउट
फाइबर ऑक्सिलेट्स एंटर द सर्कुलेशन मोर
रैपिडली। दिस सडन लोड फोर्सेस योर किडनीज़
टू वर्क हार्डर इन अ शॉर्ट टाइम फ्रेम।
व्हिच इज व्हाई सम इंडिविजुअल्स
एक्सपेरियंस [संगीत] माइल्ड बैक हेवीनेस
और इनक्रीस यूरिनेशन आफ्टर रेगुलरली
कंज्यूमिंग बीट एंड स्पिनच टुगेदर। द सेफर
ऑप्शन इस सरप्राइजिंगली सिंपल। इफ यू
एंजॉय बीट जूस कीप इट पेयर्ड विथ लो
ऑक्सिलेट वेजिटेबल्स। सच एस क्यूक्बर्स और
कैरेट्स इंसड ऑफ़ कंबाइनिंग इट विथ
स्पिनिज। मेनी पीपल स्टॉप हियर एंड थिंक
दे हैव सॉल्वड द प्रॉब्लम। बट द नेक्स्ट
मिस्टेक इज इवन मोर डिसेप्टिव। बिकॉज़ इट
इनवॉल्व्स अ फ्रूट डैट इज़ ऑफन मार्क एज़ द
परफेक्ट स्मूदी पार्टनर। एंड द रिएक्शन इट
क्रिएट्स इनसाइड द ब्लड वेसल्स इज़ समथिंग
दैट मोस्ट पीपल नेवर एक्सपेक्ट। द थर्ड
कॉम्बिनेशन दैट यू शुड नेवर मिक्स विथ
बीटर रूट इज़ बनाना। आफ्टर हियरिंग अबाउट
ग्रीस, मेनी पीपल शिफ्ट टुवर्ड्स फ्रूट
मैक्स द ड्रिंक क्रीमर, एड्स स्वीटनेस एंड
मोस्ट हेल्थ पेजेस प्रमोट इट एज़ एन एनर्जी
[संगीत] बूस्टर। बट दिस इज वेयर अनदर सटल
इमंबैलेंस कैन बिगिन इनसाइड योर बॉडी एंड
इट हैस लेस टू डू विथ डाइजेशन [संगीत] एंड
मोर टू डू विथ हाउ योर ब्लड वेसल्स
रिस्पोंड। बीटर रूट इज़ नेचुरली रिच इन
डाइटरी [संगीत] नाइट्रेट्स। वंस दीज़
नाइट्रेट्स एंटर योर बॉडी दे आर कन्वर्टेड
इंटू नाइट्रिक ऑक्साइड अ कंपाउंड दैट
रिलैक्सेस ब्लड वेसल्स एंड इंप्रूव
सर्कुलेशन। [संगीत] दिस इज़ वन ऑफ़ द रीज़ंस
व्हाई बीटर रूट इज प्रेस्ड फॉर हार्ट
हेल्थ। बनाना ऑन दी अदर हैंड [संगीत] इज
वेरी हाई इन पोटैशियम। अ मिनरल दैट आल्सो
सपोर्टस मसल रिलैक्सेशन [संगीत]
एंड इन्फ्लुएंसेस ब्लड प्रेशर बाय
हेल्पिंग योर बॉडी रिलीज़ एक्सेस सोडियम।
इंडिविजुअली [संगीत] बोथ फूड्स आर
बेनिफिशियल। द इशू अपीयर्स व्हेन यू
कंबाइंड लार्ज अमाउंट ऑफ नाइट्रेट्स
[संगीत]
फ्रॉम बीटर रूट जूस विथ हाई पोटैशियम
फ्रॉम बनानाज़ एट द सेम टाइम। दिस
कॉम्बिनेशन कैन एम्पलीफाई वेसोडाइलेशन।
[संगीत] मीनिंग योर ब्लड वेसल्स मे
रिलैक्स मोर देन योर बॉडी एक्सपेक्ट्स एट
दैट मोमेंट। सम पीपल एक्सपीरियंस सडन लाइट
हेडेडनेस, फटीग [संगीत] और इवन ड्रॉप इन
ब्लड प्रेशर शॉर्टली आफ्टर ड्रिंकिंग दिस
ब्लड। स्पेशली इफ दे ऑलरेडी हैव लो ब्लड
प्रेशर। और आर टेकिंग मेडिकेशन [संगीत]
दैट अफेक्ट्स ब्लड सर्कुलेशन। अनदर थिंग
दैट ऑफेन गोज़ अननोटिस्ड [संगीत] इज़ हाउ
दिस मिक्सचर अफेक्ट्स योर ब्लड शुगर
रिदमम। बनानाज़ डाइजेस्ट वेरी क्विकली।
[संगीत] रिलीजिंग नेचुरल शुगर दैट रेज
ब्लड ग्लूकोस लेवल्स फास्ट व्हाइल [संगीत]
बीटर रूट जूस इनक्रीसेस सर्कुलेशन स्पीड।
द फास्टर ब्लड फ्लो कैन समटाइम्स मेक द
शुगर राइस एंड फॉइल [संगीत] शार्पर व्हिच
लीव्स पीपल फीलिंग टायर्ड और शेकी लेटर
इवन दो द ड्रिंक लुक्ड मच हेल्दी। [संगीत]
सो इफ यू वांट टू यूज़ बनाना इन योर रूटीन।
इट्स बेटर टू कीप इट एस अ सेपरेट स्नैक
रादर देन ब्लेंडिंग इट डाइरेक्टली विथ बीट
जूस। आल्सो डोंट थिंक दैट डॉक्टर रोहिणी
इस स्लोली रिमूविंग आल ऑप्शंस [संगीत] टू
कंबाइंड विथ बीट रूट जूस। बाई दी एंड ऑफ़
दिस वीडियो यू विल नो एक्साक्टली व्हाट टू
कम्बाइन विथ बीट जूस। द फोर्थ कॉम्बिनेशन
दैट यू शुड नेवर मिक्स विथ बीट रूट इज़
सिट्रस फ्रूट्स। समटाइम्स वी फील टेंप्टेड
टू स्क्वीज़ अ लिटल बिट ऑफ़ लेमन विथ बीट
[संगीत] जूस बिकॉज़ इट इंस्टटेंटली मैक्स द
ड्रिंक फील फ्रेशर। मेनी पीपल बिलीव दैट
दिस इंप्रूव्स अब्सॉर्प्शन बट व्हाट
एक्चुअली हैपेंस [संगीत] इनसाइड योर स्टमक
इज क्वाइट डिफरेंट। व्हेन स्ट्रांग सिट्रस
एसिड मीट्स [संगीत] बीट जूस द ओवरऑल
एसिडिटी मिक्सचर राइजेस शार्पली एंड इट
कैन डिस्टर्ब हाउ योर बॉडी हैंडल्स
[संगीत] बीटर रूट्स नेचुरल नाइट्रेट्स।
बीट जूस आल्सो वर्क्स बेस्ट व्हेन इट्स
नाइट्रेट्स कन्वर्ट स्लोली इनटू नाइट्रिक
[संगीत] ऑक्साइड हेल्पिंग द ब्लड वेसल्स
रिलैक्स इन अ स्टेडी वे। हाइली एसिडिक
फ्रूट्स लाइक लेमन एंड ऑरेंज कैन [संगीत]
स्पीड अप द गैस्ट्रिक रिएक्शंस एंड इरिटेट
द स्टमक लाइनिंग इन सेंसिटिव
इंडिविजुअल्स। इंस्टेड ऑफ फीलिंग लाइट सम
पीपल माइट नोटिस अ बर्निंग सेंसेशन नोजिया
ओर एन अनसेटल्ड स्टमक शॉर्टली आफ्टर
ड्रिंकिंग दिस कॉम्बिनेशन। दे आल्सो अ
डाइजेस्टिव मिसमैच गोस अननोटिस्ड। सिट्रस
टेंड्स टू मूव क्विकली थ्रू द स्टमक
व्हाइल बीट जूस [संगीत] इज़ डेंसर एंड अ
स्लोअर प्रोसेस। दिस अनइवन पेसिंग कैन लीव
द ड्रिंक सिटींग अनकंफर्टेबली लीडिंग टू
ब्लोटिंग और माइल्ड क्रमपिंग। इवन दो बोथ
इन्ग्रेडिएंट्स सीम हेल्दी ऑन देयर ओन। सो
इफ यू एंजॉय लेमन ओर ऑरेंज सच काइंड ऑफ़
सिट्रेस फ्रूट्स द बेटर अप्रोच इज़ टू
ड्रिंक [संगीत] बीट रूट्स सेपरेटली एंड
हैव लेमन ओर ऑरेंज लेटर एज़ अ पार्ट ऑफ़ द
मील। कीपिंग देम अपार्ट अलाओस [संगीत] इच
फ़ूड टू वर्क ऑन इट्स ओन रिदमम विदाउट
इरिटेटिंग योर डाइजेशन। एंड जस्ट व्हेन यू
थिंक एसिडिक फूड्स आर द मेन इशू। द
नेक्स्ट कॉम्बिनेशन इज कंप्लीटली डिफरेंट
बिकॉज़ इट इनवॉल्व्स हेवी प्रोटीन फूड्स
[संगीत] दैट इंटरैक्ट विथ बीट जूस एट अ
केमिकल लेवल मोस्ट पीपल नेवर कन्सिडर।
[संगीत] फिफ्थ कॉम्बिनेशन दैट यू शुड नेवर
मिक्स विद बीट जूस इज़ एग्स, चिकन [संगीत]
ओर एनी अदर हेवी प्रोटीन फूड्स। इट
साउंड्स स्मार्ट ऑन द सरफेस। बट दिस इज़ वन
ऑफ़ दोज़ कॉम्बिनेशन व्हेयर द केमिस्ट्री
इनसाइड योर स्टमक चेंजेस इन वेज़ दैट मोस्ट
ऑफ़ अस नेवर थिंक अबाउट। बीट रूट कैरिस
नेचुरल नाइट्रेट्स व्हाइल [संगीत] फूड्स
लाइक एग्स, चिकन और फिश रिलीज़ अमाइंस
व्हेन प्रोटीन बिगिंस ब्रेकिंग डाउन
ड्यूरिंग योर डाइजेशन। व्हेन लार्ज अमाउंट
ऑफ नाइट्रेट मीट्स दीज अमाइंस इन अ हाइली
